title: Sleepytime Gal
writer: Art Arthur, Albert Duffy, Max Lief
actors: Judy Canova, Tom Brown, Billy Gilbert
plot: Bessie Cobb, cake decorator in the kitchen of one of Miami's swankier hotels, is the central figure in an elaborate scheme by bell captain Chick Patterson, who believes he can not only enrich Bessie but also himself, his fiancée, ...
